'''Ediorung''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the Interior Regions of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]].<ref name="Atlas" /> The planet was known for the dynamic [[holosculpture]]s it produced; however, these were strictly judged by the [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]] [[Art (COMPNOR)/Legends|Art]] Group.<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'', 19.</ref> [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]], the chef for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], occasionally prepared Ediorung [[Icefish/Legends|icefish]] for his master.<ref name="Taster">{{StoryCite|story=Taster's Choice: The Tale of Jabba's Chef|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
